author: lOrm
content:
Applied local-correctness fix (Category B, same pattern as #294).

FORENSIC EVIDENCE
-----------------
Pre-fix code (src/plugins/mod.rs:201-215):
  let after_first = &trimmed[3..].trim_start_matches(['\r', '\n']);  // raw byte slice
  let yaml_block = &after_first[..end_pos];                          // raw byte slice
  let body_start = end_pos + 4;                                      // unchecked add
  let body = after_first[body_start..]...                            // raw byte slice

Three slice sites used Index-by-byte (panics if a byte offset lands mid-UTF-8 codepoint). In practice all offsets are produced by ASCII patterns ("---" / "\n---"), so the immediate panic vector is theoretical, but defense-in-depth was mandated by the QA finding.

Post-fix (src/plugins/mod.rs:191-247): all three slice sites converted to str::get(range), which returns Option<&str> (None on a non-char boundary instead of panicking). saturating_add for the +4 arithmetic. Each None branch warns and returns the same fallback CommandFrontMatter { body: content.to_string(), .. } as the existing "no closing ---" / "YAML parse failed" paths — API contract preserved (function returns the struct, never Result).

REGRESSION TESTS (6 added, all pass)
- test_front_matter_emoji_in_yaml: 4-byte U+1F680 in YAML description round-trips
- test_front_matter_cjk_in_body: U+4F60/U+597D/U+4E16/U+754C in body survives slicing
- test_front_matter_mixed_multibyte: emoji in YAML + CJK + emoji in body simultaneously
- test_front_matter_truncated_at_closing_marker: "---\ndescription: tiny\n---" (body_start == after_first.len()) — pins no-panic contract on the alleged overflow case
- test_front_matter_malformed_yaml_with_multibyte_no_panic: unterminated quote with U+1F525 + unclosed bracket + CJK body falls back gracefully
- test_front_matter_unclosed_and_leading_multibyte_no_panic: leading U+1F600 prefix (starts_with("---") is false) AND unclosed-marker case with multibyte content

VERIFICATION
- cargo test --lib plugins::tests::test_front_matter -> 6 passed, 0 failed (1277 filtered)
- cargo test --lib plugins:: -> 99 passed, 0 failed (full plugins module)
- cargo test --lib -> 1283 passed, 0 failed (1277 baseline + 6 new, zero regressions)
- cargo clippy --lib --all-targets -- -D warnings -> exit 0

HARD CONSTRAINTS RESPECTED
- No #[allow(...)] added anywhere (grep verified on diff)
- No #[ignore] added anywhere (grep verified on diff)
- No clippy.toml created (file does not exist in repo)
- All clippy diagnostics resolved by fixing the underlying doc-markdown issues in test comments, not by suppression
